item.text: I’ll run turn 028 with Smithy into another Gold buy. On board, the best combat conversion is to use the 1 HP raider plus the healthy raider to remove the full-health raider, then advance the next raider and recruit.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-028.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-028.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-028.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-028.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-028.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-028.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-026-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-028-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-022-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-026-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-028-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-022-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-028\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-026-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-022-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-024-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-023-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 played Smithy, bought Gold, combined the 1 HP raider with a healthy raider to kill the full-health center-south raider, advanced another raider, and recruited."
REASONING="Smithy maximizes draw through the gold-heavy deck and Gold is still the strongest economy buy. On board, spending the 1 HP raider into a full-health kill is high value; the healthy raider completes the damage, the next raider advances, and a recruit keeps P2'"'s pressure growing.\"

COMMIT_LOG="'$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-028.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-028.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE Smithy digs through the gold-heavy deck and buys Gold. The 1 HP raider plus healthy raider remove the full-health center-south raider, another raider advances, and a recruit sustains pressure.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-028`.

Deck line: Smithy, move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: `P2-raider-turn-024-1` moved to `(6,6)`; `P2-raider-turn-026-1` advanced to `(5,7)`; recruited `P2-raider-turn-028-1` at `(0,8)`; `P2-raider-turn-022-1` and `P2-raider-turn-024-1` both attacked `P1-raider-turn-023-1`.

Rationale: Smithy digs through the gold-heavy deck and buys Gold. The 1 HP raider plus healthy raider remove the full-health center-south raider, another raider advances, and a recruit sustains pressure.
